site.name: HeadlessWP
site.description: Next.js (App Router) frontend connected to WordPress via WPGraphQL and WooCommerce.

legal.disclaimer: Sample template document. Review and adapt it with legal counsel before publishing to production.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: The data controller is the owner of this store. For any question about your personal data, contact the email shown in the footer.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: We collect the data needed to manage your account and orders: name, billing and shipping address, email and phone. Payment data is processed by the payment gateway; this store never stores card data.

sections.heading: Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: We process your data to perform the sales contract, fulfil your orders and meet legal obligations (invoicing). Analytics is enabled only with your explicit consent.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection and portability by writing to the contact email. You may also lodge a complaint with the competent data protection authority.

sections.heading: What cookies are
sections.body: Cookies are small files stored on your device. This store uses strictly necessary technical cookies (session, cart, CSRF security) that do not require consent.

sections.heading: Analytics cookies
sections.body: We set analytics cookies only if you accept them in the consent banner. You can change your choice at any time by clearing your browser cookies.

sections.heading: Managing cookies
sections.body: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Note that blocking technical cookies may prevent the use of the cart and account area.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: These terms govern the use of the store and the purchase of the products offered. By placing an order you accept these conditions in full.

sections.heading: Prices and payments
sections.body: Prices are shown in the stated currency and include applicable taxes unless otherwise indicated. Payment is confirmed when the gateway notifies the transaction as approved.

sections.heading: Availability
sections.body: Product availability depends on stock. If a product is unavailable after your order, we will inform you and arrange the corresponding refund.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: The store owner is not liable for service interruptions beyond its control. Nothing in these terms limits the rights granted to consumers by law.

sections.heading: Right of withdrawal
sections.body: You have a period to withdraw from the purchase from the moment you receive the order, as per applicable law. To exercise it, contact support with your order number.

sections.heading: Return conditions
sections.body: Products must be returned in their original condition. Some products may be excluded from the right of withdrawal under the law (e.g. personalised products).

sections.heading: Refunds
sections.body: Once the return is received and verified, we will process the refund via the same payment method used, within the timeframes set by the gateway and applicable law.

home.title: Latest posts
home.description: Content served from WordPress via WPGraphQL and statically rendered with Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR every 60s).
home.errorDescription: Check that WordPress is running and WPGraphQL responds at /graphql.
home.empty: No posts yet. Create content in the WordPress admin panel.

products.title: Store
products.errorHint: Check that WooCommerce and WooGraphQL are active.
products.reviewPlaceholder: Share your thoughts about this product…
products.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyCart: Your cart is empty. Add products before checking out.

return.title: Payment status
return.pendingHint: We're waiting for the gateway to confirm. Reload this page in a few moments.
return.notFound: We couldn't find that order, or it doesn't belong to you.

checkout.noShipping: No shipping methods available for this address.

register.title: Create account
register.verificationNotice: You will receive an email to verify your email address.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If the account exists, you will receive an email with instructions to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.error: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.

verifyEmail.bannerMessage: Your email address is not yet verified.
verifyEmail.resent: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.noTokenMessage: The verification link does not contain a valid token.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.empty: You have no favorite products yet.

twoFactor.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
twoFactor.recoveryIntro: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each one works once to sign in if you lose your device.
twoFactor.recoveryWarning: You will not see these codes again. Copy them now.
twoFactor.disablePrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app to disable 2FA:
twoFactor.disableCodeRequired: A valid code is required to disable 2FA.

account.dataErrorHint: Verify that WooCommerce and the ck/cs credentials are configured.

notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

consent.message: This site uses necessary technical cookies and, if you accept, analytics cookies to improve the service.
